summary: Phase 2.5-review-b (#257) frontend deploy: HITL/AFK runbook and provision-frontend.sh for juli-web on 127.0.0.1:3000; build-frontend-review.sh enforces NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL and UI-only login with login/home chunk validation. All five acceptance criteria mapped to contract tests. Operator HITL smoke test passed 10/10 on app-juli.com (DNS, TLS, frontend, /login demo entry, home chunks, /health 200).

mappings.criterion: npm ci && npm run build documented with NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=https://api.app-juli.com.
juli-web systemd unit binds frontend to loopback port 3000.
frontend runbook documents public urls and smoke test for /login.
UI-only reviewer path (NEXT_PUBLIC_UI_ONLY=1) documented as fallback.

recommendations: HITL smoke test passed on VPS 2026-07-03 — frontend and login verified live.
Backend /health returned 200 during smoke; juli-api may already be running from a prior deploy.
Removed accidental test.db from commit; added *.db to .gitignore.
